节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Adds access record of sensitive permission. or the count value is invalid.
注释信息: @param { number } tokenID - Token ID of the application.
@param { Permissions } permissionName - Name of the permission to be added.
@returns { Promise<void> } Promise that returns no value.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission denied. Interface caller does not have permission "ohos.permission.PERMISSION_USED_STATS".
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Not system app. Interface caller is not a system app.
@throws { BusinessError } 12100001 - The parameter is invalid. The tokenID is 0, or the string size of permissionName is larger than 256,
@throws { BusinessError } 12100002 - The specified tokenID does not exist or refer to an application process.
@throws { BusinessError } 12100003 - The specified permission does not exist or is not an user_grant permission.

parameters.说明: Name of the permission to be added.

error_codes.description: Permission denied. Interface caller does not have permission "ohos.permission.PERMISSION_USED_STATS".
Not system app. Interface caller is not a system app.
The parameter is invalid. The tokenID is 0, or the string size of permissionName is larger than 256,
The specified tokenID does not exist or refer to an application process.
The specified permission does not exist or is not an user_grant permission.
